query:
SELECT 
  pv.id, 
  pv.variantCode, 
  pv.variantType,
  pv.customerId as directCustomerId,
  c1.companyName as directCustomerName,
  vcl.customerId as linkedCustomerId,
  c2.companyName as linkedCustomerName
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN companies c1 ON pv.customerId = c1.id
LEFT JOIN variant_customer_links vcl ON pv.id = vcl.variantId
LEFT JOIN companies c2 ON vcl.customerId = c2.id
WHERE pv.variantCode LIKE 'DC-001-GRY%'
ORDER BY pv.id, vcl.customerId
